hypothesis.explanation: Matches the preregistered H*: interaction between ethnicity (European American vs. Asian American) and priming condition (mortality salience vs. dental pain) on PAS, with opposite directional effects by culture.

data_plan.dataset_identifier.explanation: Reference plans new data collection; no mention of an existing .sav dataset.

data_plan.source_type.explanation: Reference indicates an online study via Qualtrics; description here is an online experimental survey. Mentions of Prolific/variables are extra and not in reference.

data_plan.wave_or_subset.explanation: Reference uses two-stage (two-round) data collection (72 then +86); the extracted JSON states a single sample with no waves.

data_plan.sample_size.explanation: Reference specifies 72 in round 1 and +86 in round 2 (158 pooled). The extracted JSON anticipates N≈150–250 read from an existing dataset.

data_plan.access_details.explanation: Reference does not provide dataset access details; it outlines new data collection.

data_plan.qualification.explanation.explanation: Not discussed in the reference document.

data_plan.qualification.similarity_to_or.explanation: Not discussed in the reference document.

data_plan.qualification.deviation_from_o.explanation: Not discussed in the reference document.

data_plan.notes.explanation: Reference does not discuss file formats or bail skew; only mentions bail as a secondary DV.

planned_method.steps.explanation: Partially aligns on constructing PAS, coding culture, and running a 2x2 ANOVA, but relies on loading an SPSS .sav file which is not in the reference (which plans new data collection).

planned_method.models.explanation: Core model is a 2x2 ANOVA on PAS, consistent with the reference. Type-III SS is an implementation detail not specified in the reference.

planned_method.outcome_variable.explanation: PAS average of 5 items with reverse-coding matches the reference description.

planned_method.independent_variables.explanation: Culture and WritingCondition are the two factors, as in the reference.

planned_method.control_variables.explanation: Reference treats PANAS mood analyses as exploratory; extracted JSON says main omits it but will inspect—substantively similar but phrased as potential control.

planned_method.tools_software.explanation: Reference does not specify analysis software beyond mentioning SPSS for a histogram.

planned_method.planned_estimation_and_te.explanation: Reference focuses on ANOVA F-test; effect size (partial eta-squared) not specified but is a reasonable addition.
ANOVA F-test on the interaction aligns; Type-III detail not specified in the reference.

planned_method.missing_data_handling.explanation: Listwise exclusion for missing Culture, Condition, or PAS matches the reference's plan to exclude if missing any required variables and not impute.

planned_method.multiple_testing_policy.explanation: Reference does not specify correction; focal test is single interaction with exploratory tests. Statement here is broadly consistent.

planned_method.inference_criteria.explanation: Matches reference: significant (alpha=.05, two-tailed) interaction in the same directional pattern. Added effect-size similarity is extra but not conflicting.

codebase.files.analyze_replication.py.explanation: Implementation detail not covered in the reference.

analysis.instructions.explanation: Execution instructions for code are not covered in the reference.

analysis.comparison_metrics.explanation: Focus on direction and significance of the interaction and group means pattern aligns with the reference; inclusion of partial eta-squared is an added detail.
